title: ArtifactEdited payload
description: Emitted (OPT-IN) when fs.edit commits an exact-string replacement in record mode. Carries the file path + replacement count so fs.read provenance mode can fold per-edit intent into a file's mutation history without re-reading the working tree. The default fs.edit does NOT emit — this is the edit half of the write->read provenance loop. The artifact's entity reference lives in the envelope (entity_kind=artifact, entity_slug=absolute path); the edit intent is carried in the event rationale.

file_path.description: Absolute path of the file edited. Matched verbatim by fs.read provenance mode (json_extract(payload,'$.file_path')).

replacements.description: Number of occurrences replaced (1 for a single replace, the match count for replace_all, 1 for an empty-old_string create/fill).

created.description: True when an empty old_string created a new file from new_string.
